query:
INSERT INTO orderItems (orderId, productId, productName, quantity, unitPrice, totalPrice, notes, complements)
SELECT new_orders.id, oi.productId, oi.productName, oi.quantity, oi.unitPrice, oi.totalPrice, oi.notes, oi.complements
FROM orderItems oi
INNER JOIN orders old_orders ON oi.orderId = old_orders.id
INNER JOIN orders new_orders ON CONCAT('3', SUBSTRING(old_orders.orderNumber, 2)) = new_orders.orderNumber AND new_orders.establishmentId = 30001
WHERE old_orders.orderNumber LIKE '9901%' AND old_orders.establishmentId = 1

FROM orderItems oi
INNER JOIN orders old_orders ON oi.orderId = old_orders.id
INNER JOIN orders new_orders ON CONCAT('3', SUBSTRING(old_orders.orderNumber, 2)) = new_orders.orderNumber AND new_orders.establishmentId = 30001
WHERE old_orders.orderNumber LIKE '9901%' AND old_orders.establishmentId = 1
